strategy: Hit with Life (+30%) and avoid Death (60% resist).
He self-buffs with Dark Pact and Empower to hit harder; expect his damage to ramp and keep shields up.
When you attack him he Steals Health from his partner Brulee Sucre, healing himself off her; focus one down and be ready for that transfer.
Whenever Claudas blades, Brulee casts Guidance, and Brulee self-Spirit-Armors after taking damage; account for that absorb when you hit her.
Blade up and finish Claudas with one Life hit, or split damage to drop both together.
cheatNotes: He Dark Pacts to buff himself at a health cost; his damage ramps, so shield up.
He Empowers for extra pips and damage; expect bigger hits over time.
Attacking him makes him Steal Health from Brulee, healing himself; focus fire and expect the transfer.
When Claudas blades, Brulee gives Guidance; his accuracy improves, so do not count on him fizzling.
Brulee Spirit-Armors herself after taking damage; account for that absorb when you hit her.
